title: Understanding the Problem
text: The bird is perched at the middle of the telephone line, causing tension in the line. We need to calculate this tension when the angle theta is $$0.5$$ degrees.

title: Forces Acting on the Bird
text: The bird's weight acts downward, and the tension in the line acts along the line at an angle theta with the horizontal.

title: Components of Tension
text: The tension in the line has two components: a vertical component that balances the bird's weight and a horizontal component.

title: Calculate the Vertical Component of Tension
text: The vertical component of tension $$T sin\left(\theta\right)$$ must equal the weight of the bird. Use the formula: $$T sin\left(\theta\right)=m g$$, where $$m$$ is the mass of the bird and g is the acceleration due to gravity.

title: Solve for Tension
text: Rearrange the equation to solve for T: $$T=\frac{m g}sin^$\left(\theta\righ$$.

title: Calculate the Numerical Value of Tension
text: Substitute the values into the equation to find the tension.
